heroSubtitle: Register once, choose your district and panchayat village, review live weather, and generate a crop yield estimate for field planning.
weatherAfterLocation: Weather is fetched automatically after district selection.
locationHelper: ಜಿಲ್ಲೆ, ತಾಲ್ಲೂಕು ಮತ್ತು ಗ್ರಾಮವನ್ನು ಪಟ್ಟಿಯಿಂದ ಆಯ್ಕೆ ಮಾಡಿ.
sampleLocationNotice: Official village panchayat names are loaded from the provided master list. Taluk names are shown from the official taluk dataset.
weatherHelper: Weather is fetched automatically after district selection. District is used for weather even when taluk is selected.
demoWeatherNote: ಲೈವ್ ಹವಾಮಾನ API ಕೀ ಸಂರಚಿಸಲಾಗಿಲ್ಲ. ಡೆಮೊ ಹವಾಮಾನ ಡೇಟಾ ತೋರಿಸಲಾಗುತ್ತಿದೆ.
selectFullLocation: Select district, taluk, and village first.
heavyRainAlert: Heavy rain risk. Check drainage before irrigation.
predictionHelper: AI prediction uses historical crop and rainfall data.
fetchWeatherFirst: Select a district so weather can be fetched before prediction.
predictionFailed: Prediction failed. Please check the details.
predictionPlaceholder: Prediction result will appear here after weather is fetched and the form is submitted.
districtLevelNote: ಅಂದಾಜು ಜಿಲ್ಲಾ ಮಟ್ಟದ ಇತಿಹಾಸ ಬೆಳೆ ಮತ್ತು ಮಳೆ ಡೇಟಾದಿಂದ ಸೃಷ್ಟಿಸಲಾಗುತ್ತದೆ. ತಾಲ್ಲೂಕು ಮತ್ತು ಗ್ರಾಮ ಸ್ಥಳೀಯೀಕರಣ ಮತ್ತು ರೈತ ದಾಖಲೆಗಾಗಿ ಬಳಸಲಾಗುತ್ತದೆ.
latestNewsText: Crop advisory and rainfall updates will help farmers plan the next field activity.
governmentSchemesText: Add PM-KISAN, crop insurance, subsidy, and local agriculture department updates here.
testimonialsText: Farmers can record how predictions helped planning and irrigation decisions.
footerText: Smart Crop Yield Prediction Platform for academic demo and farmer advisory workflows.
officialLocationDataRequired: Official taluk and village data is required before prediction can be enabled.
loginHelper: Login or register to save farmer records and access role-based tools.
name: Full name
sensorHelper: Live ESP32 field readings refresh automatically.
officialVillageDatasetMissing: ಅಧಿಕೃತ ಗ್ರಾಮ ಡೇಟಾಸೆಟ್ ಲೋಡ್ ಆಗಿಲ್ಲ. ಜಿಲ್ಲೆ ಮತ್ತು ತಾಲ್ಲೂಕನ್ನು ಬಳಸಿ ಅಂದಾಜನ್ನು ಮುಂದುವರಿಸಬಹುದು.
registeredFarmersHelper: ಬ್ಯಾಕೆಂಡ್ users ಪಟ್ಟಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಉಳಿಸಿದ ರೈತ, ಅಧಿಕಾರಿ ಮತ್ತು ನಿರ್ವಾಹಕ ಖಾತೆಗಳು.
iotCalibrationHelper: Calibrate the ESP32 soil sensor using real dry and wet readings.
calibrationSteps: Place the probe in dry soil or air and set dry, then in wet soil and set wet. The backend stores these values for sensor moisture calculation.
noRawSoilValue: No ESP32 raw soil value is available yet.
dryValueSelected: Current raw reading saved as dry value.
wetValueSelected: Current raw reading saved as wet value.
loginGateHelper: Register or login first. Farmers can access prediction, weather, and dashboard only after login.
loginRequired: Please register or login before using prediction.
predictionFormIncomplete: Please select district, crop, season, and area before predicting.
